name: Karen
history: Ongoing workplace difficulties involving underappreciation and lack of support. Repeated experiences of ideas and suggestions not being accepted.
intermediate_belief: I need to be competent and respected to be valued.
intermediate_belief_depression: If I am not competent, I will be dismissed and lose my job.
coping_strategies: Avoid confrontation and suppress emotions until overwhelmed.
situation: A workplace discussion about culture and atmosphere conflicted with a client meeting scheduled by the mentor.
auto_thought: No one listens to me or values my input.
behavior: Avoids speaking up in meetings and internalizes stress, leading to emotional outbursts in private.
